{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230440230C3189D89FF45924485F"}"},"total":3981},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7378244311999071038","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的很好看，建议看这本，很刺激，男主很牛逼"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1717887928,"group_id":"7365699991219751961","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzfNFjx+LnTWN8dzwQmfvylFS8mkT1LPySp0sIW7vXnZ","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4409508555925659","user_name":"喜欢巴西黑的朱韬奋"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4409508555925659","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7365699991219751961","book_info":{"abstract":"武道世界，异兽横行，唯有成为武者才能掌握自身命运！
许秋穿越到这个世界，开局进行武魂觉醒仪式，却发现自身没有武魂，原本身为学神的他被众人嘲笑。
女友更是当众分手！
但，他不慌。
武魂没觉醒，但他却觉醒了人生选择系统，只要做出各种选择就可以获得各种奖励。
面对女友分手，他有以下选择。
“选择一：跪下求萧魅不要分手，从此颜面丢尽，系统再奖励宿主十个耳光！”
“选择二：平静的答应分手，并且暗自决定，以后发愤图强，超越对方！奖励宿主S级武魂暴风锤！”
“选择三：上前给对方一个耳光，宣布是你甩了对方，捍卫自己的尊严！奖励宿主十大凶兽武魂！！”
这还用选？
许秋当场觉醒十大凶兽武魂，从此踏上无敌路！
饕餮武魂，吞噬万物！
白虎武魂，杀伐天地！
雷龙武魂，掌控雷霆！
地狱凤凰武魂，不灭之火，生生不息！
鲲鹏武魂，速度之极致，超越光速！

想象力丰富，构建武魂新世界：作者构建了一个宏大的武魂世界，各种神奇的武魂和精彩的战斗场面，给人强烈的视觉冲击和阅读快感，满足了对奇幻世界的想象 。                                                       - 剧情跌宕起伏，节奏感强：小说剧情紧凑，主角许秋不断面临挑战与危机，与强大敌人战斗，如与魔天教的对抗等，高潮迭起，让读者欲罢不能，且作者对故事节奏把握精准。                                       - 文笔流畅，故事不小白：语言简洁流畅，能够生动地描绘出各种场景和人物情感，使读者有身临其境之感， 故事也并非简单的套路堆砌，在情节设计和人物塑造上有独特之处，吸引读者深入阅读."},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1734241565,"group_id":"7365699991219751961","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5QKXwFkKsMmnN0CcJgqaPUDU4QesODJhyvzb5z4iM0s","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4a9cb164cddc48dcbd64933eb3a659b4~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792219&x-signature=UumWbxPIFMnG0%2B3UQ6uTeio3xsk%3D","user_id":"2897952803654494","user_name":"用户27992455"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2897952803654494","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"vip","title_id":"vip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7365699991219751961","book_info":{"abstract":"武道世界，异兽横行，唯有成为武者才能掌握自身命运！
